tax_filing.title: SPED ecosystem (ECD / ECF / EFD); monthly obligations
tax_filing.summary: SPED Contábil (ECD), SPED Fiscal (ECF), EFD-Contribuições; monthly digital obligations.

vat_gst.title: EXTREME: ICMS / IPI / PIS / COFINS / ISS — cascading taxes
vat_gst.summary: EXTREME complexity: 5+ overlapping indirect tax regimes (state ICMS, federal IPI/PIS/COFINS, municipal ISS); cascading and partly non-creditable.

vat_gst.title: Brazil indirect tax reform (CBS/IBS) — phased 2026-2033
vat_gst.summary: Constitutional tax reform replaces PIS/COFINS/ICMS/ISS with CBS (federal) and IBS (state/municipal); test phase 2026, full transition through 2033.

e_invoicing.title: NF-e / NFS-e via SEFAZ — clearance model since 2006
e_invoicing.summary: Universal NF-e for goods; new national NFS-e standard rolling out for services. Real-time clearance — invoice not legally valid until SEFAZ accepts.

payroll.title: EXTREME: INSS + FGTS + 13th salary + eSocial
payroll.summary: EXTREME complexity: INSS social security (20%) + FGTS (8%) + mandatory 13th-month salary + eSocial real-time payroll reporting; ~35% employer burden.

local_gaap.title: Brazilian GAAP (CPC) aligned with IFRS
local_gaap.summary: CPC (Comitê de Pronunciamentos Contábeis) standards aligned with IFRS; tax CoA used for SPED.

banking_payments.title: PIX instant payments + Open Finance Brazil (Phase 4)
banking_payments.summary: PIX dominant for real-time payments since 2020; Open Finance Brazil now in Phase 4 with payment initiation.
